summary: Soundboard recording praised as amazing with a great job by the Hollister crew.
review: The sole review is overwhelmingly positive, calling the tape “amazing” and complimenting the work of the Hollister archivists. No specific musical or technical details are given, but the 4‑star rating suggests a solid soundboard source that sounds good enough to recommend.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review; it is positive and awards four stars, indicating a generally good performance and recording despite lack of detail.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes the recording as “amazing” with no complaints; no specific comments on clarity or mix.
